info.title: Planning Module
info.description: The Planning module enables organisations/churches to produce plans for services, events and bookings or to create an unlinked plan. Plans are a great way to keep everyone in the loop about the running order for an occasion so that those involved know precisely who's doing what and when within the running order.

tags.name: LibraryItems
tags.description: Library items can be added to plans on an adhoc basis but you can save time by building a library of the items that you use time and again.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Plans
tags.description: Add plans for managing and organising your services, events and bookings.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Songs
tags.description: Add songs to your library, to use as building blocks to plan services.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Create templates where the same or similar plans are added time and again.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Types
tags.description: Add types to help categorise items. For example, you might add types for Prayers, Liturgy, Readings and Announcements.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

404.description: Not Found - the resource or API endpoint cannot be found.

429.description: Too Many Requests - the rate limit has been exceeded.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds until the rate limiting period expires

message.example: The rate limit has been exceeded.
enum: The rate limit has been exceeded.

LibraryItem.description: A single Library Item from the Planning module.

duration.description: The Library Item's duration in seconds.

status.description: The current status of the Library Item.

archived_at.description: Date and time the Library Item was archived.

created_at.description: Date and time the Library Item was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Library Item.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Library Item was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Library Item.

Note.description: A single Note, as found in multiple modules.

content.example: Had a conversation about this on 12th of July.

pinned.description: Whether the Note has been pinned.

visible_to.description: Who the resource is visible to, or null if there are no restrictions.

just_me.description: Whether the resource is visible to just the current user or not.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

created_at.description: Date and time the Note was created.

created_by.description: The user that created the Note.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Note was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Note.

content.example: Had a conversation about this on 12th of July.

pinned.description: Whether the Note should be pinned.

oneOf.description: Who the resource is visible to. Do not include in the request if there are no restrictions. If included in the request, only one of `just_me` or `user_group_ids` can be set.

just_me.description: The resource should only be visible to the current user

oneOf.description: Who the resource is visible to, or null if there are no restrictions.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to. You are only able to add user group IDs for user groups you have access to.

num_results.description: The total number of results available

per_page.description: The requested number of results per page

next_page.description: The page number of the next page of results, if there is one

prev_page.description: The page number of the previous page of results, if there is one

Plan.description: A single Plan from the Planning module.

identifier.description: The unique identifier for the Plan.

template_id.description: The Template ID where the Plan is created from a Template.

service_id.description: The Service ID where the Plan is linked to a Service.

event_id.description: The Event ID where the Plan is linked to a Event.

booking_id.description: The Booking ID where the Plan is linked to a Booking.

note_categories.description: Note categories used for recording specific notes against each Plan Item.

all_sites.description: Whether the Plan belongs to all sites or not.

site_ids.description: List of all site IDs the Plan belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the Plan.

created_at.description: Date and time the Plan was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Plan.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Plan was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Plan.

PlanItem.description: A single Plan Item from the Planning module.

plan_id.description: The Plan ID the Plan Item belongs to.

arrangement_id.description: The Arrangement ID where the Plan Item is linked to a Song or null if it is linked to a Library Item.

duration.description: The default duration of the Plan Item, in seconds.

time_start.description: Start time of the Plan Item.

comment.description: The Plan Item's comment or null if it is a Song.

notes.description: Notes for this item, organized by note category order.

note_category_id.description: The UUID of the note category the note belongs to.

settings.description: The item's settings when the item is a Song.

tempo.description: The BPM temp of the Song.

response_options.description: The Question's response options or null if the response does not have response options.

anyOf.description: Selected options for a bible response type.

book.description: The book of the bible the passage is from, abbreviated to the first three letters.

version.description: The abbreviated version of the bible.

anyOf.description: Selected options for a checkboxes response type.
Value of paragraph, phone, radio, select or text response types.
Value of a spotify response type.

name.example: Come Now is the Time to Worship

album_name.description: The name of the album the song belongs to.

anyOf.description: Value of a video response type.

order.description: The positional order of the Question.

hidden.description: Whether the Question is hidden or not.

items.description: The people linked with the Plan Item.

resource_id.description: This property should no longer be used, please use "id" instead.

resource_type.description: This property should no longer be used, please use "type" instead..

first_name.description: The first name of the person.

last_name.description: The last name of the person.

type.description: The person's type, indicating whether they are a Contact or Child.

order.description: The positional order of the Plan Item.

created_at.description: Date and time the Plan Item was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Plan Item.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Plan Item was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Plan Item.

SongArrangement.description: A single Song Arrangement from the Planning module.

name.description: The Song Arrangement's name, if the Song Arrangement has no name, this will be the name of the Song it is linked to.

key.description: The key of the Song Arrangement.

tempo.description: The BPM tempo of the Song Arrangement.

meter.description: The meter of the Song Arrangement.

scale.description: The scale of the Song Arrangement.

duration.description: The default duration of the Song Arrangement, in seconds.

chart.description: The chords or lyrics of the Song Arrangement.
chart.example:
VERSE 1:
[Eb]A - [Bb]bide with [Cm]me; [Eb/G]fast     [Ab]falls the [Bb]even - [Eb]tide
[Eb]The darkness [Ab]deep - [Eb/G]ens;     [Fm7]Lord with [F7]me a - [Bb]bide
[Eb]When [B]bother [Cm]help - [Eb/G]ers     [Ab]fail and [C7]comforts [Fm]flee
[Bb/Ab]Help of the [Eb/G]helpless, [Ab]O a - [Eb/Bb]bide [Bb7]with [Eb]me

modified_at.description: Date and time the Song Arrangement was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Song Arrangement.
